calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-06-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Xochitl A. Lopez, Esq. of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, Tel: 510.337.1001, for petitioner and moving party;
Cecilia Mangoba, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel: 415.554.3927, for respondent and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PETITIONER SERVICE EMPLOYEES INTERNATIONAL UNION, LOCAL 1021's Petition To Compel Arbitration, as follows:

Petitioner Service Employees International Union, Local 1021's petition to compel arbitration is granted.

(See word minutes for the court's full ruling.)

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
